title: Rush Word
description:
Rush Word is a fast-paced word game where you complete missing letters, translate words, and earn the highest score. Play solo or challenge another player in 1v1 multiplayer, with support for English, Czech, and Slovak, plus optional diacritics.

Rush Word is a word-based game focused on speed, accuracy, vocabulary, and translation. Your goal is to complete missing letters, translate words correctly, and earn the highest possible score.

In singleplayer mode, you can practice your vocabulary, improve your typing speed, and try to beat your previous score. Each round gives you new word challenges where correct and fast answers are important.

In 1v1 multiplayer, two players compete against each other. Both players try to solve the words faster, avoid mistakes, and finish with the highest score.

The game supports English, Czech, and Slovak. You can also choose whether diacritics are enabled or disabled, allowing you to play with full Czech and Slovak characters or use a simpler mode without diacritics.

Main features:

• Complete missing letters

• Translate words

• Score-based gameplay

• Singleplayer mode

• Competitive 1v1 multiplayer

• English, Czech, and Slovak language support

• Optional diacritics

• Fast and simple word challenges

Improve your score, expand your vocabulary, and prove that you can think and type faster than your opponent.
description_short: Rush Word is a fast-paced competitive word game where players race to find and type words before their opponent. Play solo to improve your vocabulary or challenge friends in online 1v1 matches through Steam invites.
